str_to_date.syntax_info: This is the inverse of the DATE_FORMAT() function. It takes a string str and a format string format. STR_TO_DATE() returns a DATETIME value if the format string contains both date and time parts, or a DATE or TIME value if the string contains only date or time parts. If str or format is NULL, the function returns NULL.

subtime.syntax_info: SUBTIME() returns expr1 − expr2 expressed as a value in the same format as expr1. expr1 is a time or datetime expression, and expr2 is a time expression. Resolution of this function's return type is performed as it is for the ADDTIME() function. This function returns NULL if expr1 or expr2 is NULL.

CASE.raw_syntax_name: CASE value WHEN compare_value THEN result [WHEN compare_value THEN result ...] [ELSE result] END
